:''See also: [[Micropets]]'' 
[[File:Professor Oat's Lab.png|thumb]]Professor Oat is the source and caretaker for eggs that hatch into [[micropets]], which are pets for your [[birb]]. Visiting '''Professor Oat's Lab''' is the fastest way to get a new egg after you hatch one. Otherwise, he will eventually pop up in your game to offer you one. 

==Visiting the Lab==
[[File:ShopViewCircle.jpg|thumb]]
[[File:BirbsInventory.jpg|thumb]]
Start your trip to the lab by going to the fifth tab at the bottom of your game screen, labelled "Bag." Then choose [[Micropets]]. You will see a grassy playland, with ten of your hatched micropets moving around. At the top right of the screen, there is an icon of the Professor's head, labelled "Lab." Click it to see Professor Oat. {{Clear}}
[[File:Micropetplayland.jpg|thumb]]

==Obtaining an egg== 
You can get an egg from the lab right away, as above. If you do not have an egg, [[Professor Oat]] will soon pop up in your game and offer you one. Regardless of where you get the egg, you must link the hatching to one of your repeat goals. To hatch the egg, you must accomplish that goal 7 times. 

===Choosing a goal===
[[File:ChooseEggHatchGoal.png|thumb]]It is up to you to choose which repeat goal  to connect to hatching. Some people choose an easy goal so they can get their pet easily. Some people choose a more difficult goal, with the hatching as an incentive. And some in between! Regardless, you must accomplish that goal 7 times. 

You may find that you want to switch to a different goal. You can do that by unlinking the egg in the progress screen (described below), but all progress will be lost. When you choose a new goal you will have to accomplish it 7 times.  

==Egg progress==
[[File:MicropetEggCloseToHatching.png|thumb]]Each time you accomplish the linked goal, you'll get a popup screen telling you that your egg has progressed towards hatching. The display tells you how many more times are needed to finish. (The "Unlink egg" option will delete your progress to let you choose a different goal.)

You can get the progress popup anytime in two ways. Open the micropets screen in your bag. It has a grid showing all of your micropets. The grid begins with your egg, which has a progress bar. Click it to see how many goal completions are needed to hatch the egg. Alternatively, you can click Professor Oat's Lab icon at the top right of the screen. Select "Check the egg's progress" to see a screen identical to the other methods. 

==Hatching== 
The seventh time you accomplish your goal, a popup will notify you that your egg is ready to hatch. The egg will crack dramatically, and a picture will introduce your new micropet. 

==Get a new egg== 
As soon as your micropet hatches, you are eligible for another egg. Click the Lab icon to get another egg immediately.
